title: limonium asterotrichum
intro: Limonium asterotrichum, also known as Sea Lavender, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Limonium asterotrichum include soothing respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and improving skin conditions like eczema. Herbal preparations of Sea Lavender often include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to relieve stress, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality.
